core_objective.text: BUILD DATA LEAKAGE AUDIT PIPELINE for quant research: synthetic datasets with planted leakage traps (future labels, scaler fit on test, random train/test overlap), automated leakage detectors (shift tests, correlation spikes, purged split validators), scoring harness, and pytest suite proving detectors catch each trap class. No live trading.

master_plan.title: Config + synthetic data generators
master_plan.intent: config.py smoke flags. synthetic_data.py: generate_clean_series, future_label_trap, scaler_trap, overlap_trap datasets as pandas DataFrames with metadata tags.

master_plan.title: Shift and correlation detectors
master_plan.intent: detectors.py: detect_future_shift(features, labels), detect_scaler_leakage(train_stats, test_stats), detect_index_overlap(train_idx, test_idx). Return structured LeakageFinding list.

master_plan.title: Purged split validator
master_plan.intent: purged_validator.py: assert_purge_valid with embargo bars, chronological ordering, no train/test index intersection. Integrate with detectors.

master_plan.title: Audit runner + report
master_plan.intent: audit_runner.py: run full audit on dataset tag, aggregate findings, score severity. reports/leakage_audit.json + md summary.

master_plan.title: pytest trap suite
master_plan.intent: tests/test_detectors.py: each trap must be detected (assert findings non-empty). tests/test_clean_pass.py: clean data passes. tests/test_purged_splits.py.
